Support for emmeans

Source: R/emmeans.R
recover_data.lmm.Rd

These methods allow emmeans::emmeans() to recover the fixed-effects reference grid and use model-specific Satterthwaite degrees of freedom.

Usage

# S3 method for class 'lmm'
recover_data(object, frame = object$model_frame, ...)

# S3 method for class 'lmm'
emm_basis(object, trms, xlev, grid, ...)

Arguments

object

An lmm object.

frame

Model frame.

...

Additional arguments passed by emmeans.

trms, xlev, grid

Arguments supplied by emmeans.

Value

An emmeans data-recovery object.

A basis list used by emmeans.

On this page
